title: EOG Resources (EOG) Beats Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates

title: EOG Resources: Buy The Breakout (Technical Analysis)

title: Get Paid Handsomely With EOG Resources
text: In this article, I start by explaining my long-term view on oil prices and my desire to invest in companies that let investors benefit through high (special) dividends. EOG Resources checks all boxes, as it has high reserves, efficient production, a healthy balance sheet, and a focus on high shareholder returns.
